README.purpose: Independence Phase 3.3 champion cases — SHAMS-only feasibility templates (class/like inspiration, not device parity or PROCESS MFILE numbers).
README.feasibility: Design Intent hard set (Point Designer policy). Research: q95 blocking. Reactor: full reactor hard set. Non-finite constraint values omitted.

champion.sparc_class.burning_plasma.title: SPARC-class compact HTS burning-plasma (Research)
champion.sparc_class.burning_plasma.story: Compact high-field HTS class point under Research intent — q95-feasible template labs can fork.

champion.step_like.st_baseline.title: STEP-like spherical tokamak baseline (Reactor) — NO-SOLUTION
champion.step_like.st_baseline.story: Literature-geometry ST baseline under Reactor intent. Expected NO-SOLUTION with mechanism atlas (PROFILE/q95) — SHAMS differentiator vs soft-landing solvers.

champion.reactor_conservative.iter_like.title: Reactor-class conservative (ITER-like Research)
champion.reactor_conservative.iter_like.story: Large LTS-class conservative point under Research intent — reproducible admissible template.

champion.sparc_class.overdriven_nosoluti.title: SPARC-class overdriven variant (Research) — NO-SOLUTION
champion.sparc_class.overdriven_nosoluti.story: Deliberate infeasible variant of the SPARC-class family (raised Ip). Expect PROFILE/q95 atlas attribution.
